title: USS Mississippi
summary:
USS Mississippi, named either for the state of Mississippi or the Mississippi River, may refer to:

USS Mississippi (1841), a sidewheel frigate that saw action in the Mexican–American War and was lost during the American Civil War
USS Mississippi (BB-23), the lead ship of the Mississippi class of battleships; she saw action before World War I and was eventually sold to Greece
USS Mississippi (BB-41), a New Mexico-class battleship that saw action during World War II
USS Mississippi (CGN-40), a Virginia-class nuclear-powered guided missile cruiser
USS Mississippi (SSN-782), a Virginia-class submarine commissioned in 2012
